title: Dream Revelation (Hermes' Wondrous Victory Charm)
text: Eros, darling PASSALEON ET, send me my personal [angel/daimon] tonight to give me information about whatever the concern is. For I do this on order from PAN-CHOUCHI THASSOU at whose order you are to act, because I conjure you by the four regions of the universe, APSAGAEL CHACHOU MERIOUT MERMERIOUT and by the one who is above the four regions of the universe, KICH MERMERIOUTH.
offering: Take equal portions of dirt from your sandal, of resin, and of the droppings from a white dove. While speaking the invocation, burn them as an offering to the Bear.
phylactery: Write these names on a strip of tin: ACHACHAEL CHACHOU MARMARIOUTI. Wear it around your neck.
procedure: Sleep on a newly made bed of rushes
The daimon will appear in dream with the answer
notes: Low-stakes dream revelation format. Calls upon personal daimon/angel through Eros as mediator. Same daimon concept as PGM VII.505–528 but simpler procedure.
